response: Looking at the stem and leaf plot, we can see that the mode of the data set is the most frequently occurring value. By observing the plot, we see that the value $58$ appears twice, while all other values appear only once or less frequently. Therefore, the mode of the data set is $58$. Next, we need to find the median. The median is the middle value of the data set when it is ordered from smallest to largest. Since there are $24$ values in the data set (as can be seen from the stem and leaf plot), the median will be the average of the $12^\text{th}$ and $13^\text{th}$ values when the data is ordered. By counting the values in the stem and leaf plot, we see that the $12^\text{th}$ and $13^\text{th}$ values are both $53$. Therefore, the median is $53$. The positive difference between the median and the mode is $58 - 53 = 5$. </think> <answer> 5 </answer>
